languages.text: "Имя кануло в эонах времени, ничтожный. Некогда я был тем, кто покорял твердь, геомантом великой династии". {n}Обрубки верхних конечностей некрона бессильно дергаются, словно он пытается воспроизвести некий жест.{/n}

"The name has faded into the aeons of time, lowly one. I was once one who conquered the firmament, a Geomancer of a great dynasty." {n}The stumps of the Necron's upper limbs twitch impotently, as if it were trying to make some gesture.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Имя кануло в эонах времени, ничтожный. Некогда я был тем, кто покорял твердь, геомантом великой династии". {n}Обрубки верхних конечностей некрона бессильно дергаются, словно он пытается воспроизвести некий жест.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "The name has faded into the aeons of time, lowly one. I was once one who conquered the firmament, a Geomancer of a great dynasty." {n}The stumps of the Necron's upper limbs twitch impotently, as if it were trying to make some gesture.{/n}

"The name has faded into the aeons of time, lowly one. I was once one who conquered the firmament, I was called a geomancer of a great dynasty." {n}The stumps of the Necron's upper limbs twitch impotently, as if it were trying to make some gesture.{/n}

"The name has faded into the aeons of time, lowly one. I was once one who conquered the firmament, I was called a geomancer of a great dynasty." {n}The stumps of the Necron's upper limbs twitch impotently, as if it were trying to make some gesture.{/n}

"The name has faded into the aeons of time, lowly one. I was once one who conquered the firmament, a Geomancer of a great dynasty." {n}The stumps of the Necron's upper limbs twitch impotently, as if it were trying to make some gesture.{/n}

languages.text: “我的名讳已消逝在时间的洪流中，卑贱者。我曾是征服苍穹之人，一个伟大王朝的地卜师。”{n}太空死灵残缺的上肢无力地抽动着，仿佛正试图做出某个手势。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The name has faded into the aeons of time, lowly one. I was once one who conquered the firmament, a Geomancer of a great dynasty." {n}The stumps of the Necron's upper limbs twitch impotently, as if it were trying to make some gesture.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我的名讳已消逝在时间的洪流中，卑贱者。我曾是征服苍穹之人，一个伟大王朝的地卜师。”{n}太空死灵残缺的上肢无力地抽动着，仿佛正试图做出某个手势。{/n}

languages.text: «Mi nombre se pierde en los anales de la historia, escoria. En mis tiempos conquisté el firmamento como geomante de una gran dinastía». {n}Los muñones superiores del Necrón se mueven, imponentes, como si su propietario quisiera gesticular.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The name has faded into the aeons of time, lowly one. I was once one who conquered the firmament, a Geomancer of a great dynasty." {n}The stumps of the Necron's upper limbs twitch impotently, as if it were trying to make some gesture.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Mi nombre se pierde en los anales de la historia, escoria. En mis tiempos conquisté el firmamento como geomante de una gran dinastía». {n}Los muñones superiores del Necrón se mueven, imponentes, como si su propietario quisiera gesticular.{/n}

languages.text: « Mon nom s'est perdu dans les méandres du temps, créature inférieure. Je me suis un jour trouvé au firmament, géomancien d'une grande dynastie. » {n}Les moignons des membres supérieurs du Nécron tressaillent, impuissants, comme s'il tentait d'esquisser un geste.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The name has faded into the aeons of time, lowly one. I was once one who conquered the firmament, a Geomancer of a great dynasty." {n}The stumps of the Necron's upper limbs twitch impotently, as if it were trying to make some gesture.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Mon nom s'est perdu dans les méandres du temps, créature inférieure. Je me suis un jour trouvé au firmament, géomancien d'une grande dynastie. » {n}Les moignons des membres supérieurs du Nécron tressaillent, impuissants, comme s'il tentait d'esquisser un geste.{/n}

languages.text: "İsmim, zamanın sonsuzluğunda silinip gitti. Bir zamanlar gök kubbe fatihiydim, büyük bir hanedanlığa mensup bir Yerbaz olarak bilinirdim." {n}Nekron'un vücudunun üst kısmındaki uzuvların güdükleri, sanki jest yapmaya çalışıyormuş gibi çaresizce seğiriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The name has faded into the aeons of time, lowly one. I was once one who conquered the firmament, a Geomancer of a great dynasty." {n}The stumps of the Necron's upper limbs twitch impotently, as if it were trying to make some gesture.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "İsmim, zamanın sonsuzluğunda silinip gitti. Bir zamanlar gök kubbe fatihiydim, büyük bir hanedanlığa mensup bir Yerbaz olarak bilinirdim." {n}Nekron'un vücudunun üst kısmındaki uzuvların güdükleri, sanki jest yapmaya çalışıyormuş gibi çaresizce seğiriyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Der Name ist in den Äonen der Zeit verblasst, niederes Wesen. Einst beherrschte ich das Firmament und war der Geomant einer mächtigen Dynastie." {n}Die Armstümpfe des Necron zucken kraftlos, als würde er versuchen, eine Geste zu machen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The name has faded into the aeons of time, lowly one. I was once one who conquered the firmament, a Geomancer of a great dynasty." {n}The stumps of the Necron's upper limbs twitch impotently, as if it were trying to make some gesture.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Der Name ist in den Äonen der Zeit verblasst, niederes Wesen. Einst beherrschte ich das Firmament und war der Geomant einer mächtigen Dynastie." {n}Die Armstümpfe des Necron zucken kraftlos, als würde er versuchen, eine Geste zu machen.{/n}

languages.text: 「その名は時を超えて消え去った、卑しい者よ。かつて私は天を制覇した者、偉大な王朝に仕える地術師と呼ばれた。」{n}ネクロンの上肢の残骸が、何かを表現しようとするかのように無力に痙攣する。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The name has faded into the aeons of time, lowly one. I was once one who conquered the firmament, I was called a geomancer of a great dynasty." {n}The stumps of the Necron's upper limbs twitch impotently, as if it were trying to make some gesture.{/n}
